title: Epic: methods.rs refactor and fixture tests
description:
Why: methods.rs is a monolith that will grow unmanageable as we add 20+ new methods. Split into per-type-family modules so parallel agents can work independently. Also establish the fixture-based test pattern (wiremock + committed JSON fixtures) that all method epics depend on.

What:
- Split crates/jmap-chat/src/methods.rs into methods/chat.rs, methods/contact.rs, methods/message.rs, methods/space.rs, methods/misc.rs
- Write wiremock integration tests for all EXISTING methods using spec-example fixtures
- Fixture files live in crates/jmap-chat/tests/fixtures/
